query:
INSERT INTO automation_policies (
  tenant_id,
  policy_name,
  min_automation_confidence,
  min_hybrid_confidence,
  eligible_claim_types,
  excluded_claim_types,
  max_ai_only_approval_amount,
  max_hybrid_approval_amount,
  max_fraud_score_for_automation,
  fraud_sensitivity_multiplier,
  eligible_vehicle_categories,
  excluded_vehicle_makes,
  min_vehicle_year,
  max_vehicle_age,
  require_manager_approval_above,
  allow_policy_override,
  is_active,
  version,
  effective_from
) VALUES (
  (SELECT id FROM insurer_tenants LIMIT 1),
  'Balanced Policy',
  85,
  65,
  '["collision", "theft", "vandalism", "weather", "fire"]',
  '[]',
  7500000,
  20000000,
  30,
  1.0,
  '["sedan", "suv", "hatchback", "truck"]',
  '[]',
  2010,
  15,
  10000000,
  1,
  1,
  1,
  NOW()
);
